Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 162. A Letter from the Recruitment Officers (ABL 1036)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[a-na] ⸢LUGAL⸣ KUR.KUR EN-i-ni

(1) [To the kin]g of (all) lands, our lord: [your servants] the recruitment officers [responsible for horse]s. Good health [to the king], ou[r lord]!

o 22

[ARAD-MEŠ-ka LÚv].mu-šar-ki-sa-a-ni

o 33

[ša ANŠE.KUR.RA]-MEŠ* lu-u DI-mu

o 44

[a-na LUGAL EN-i]-⸢ni⸣ ša LUGAL EN-in-ni

(4) As to what the king our lord [wrote to us]: "Man[y ......"

o 55

[iš-pur-an-na-ši]-ni ma-a

o 66

[x x x x ma]-aʾ*-du-u-te

o 77

[x x x x x]+⸢x x x⸣

rest broken away

(Break)

Reverse
rr beginning broken away

r 1'1'

[x x x x x x x]-⸢i⸣-ni

r 2'2'

[x x x x x x x]+⸢x⸣-u-ni

r 3'3'

[x x x x x x x] ki-i

r 4'4'

[x x x x x dul]-⸢li*⸣-in-ni

(r 4) ......] our [work ......] what[ever ...] it be [... we shall not be ne]gligent, the watch [... will be st]rict.

r 5'5'

[x x x x x]-⸢ši?⸣-i-ni

r 6'6'

[x x x x x ši]-⸢ti⸣-i-ni

Right
r.e. 7r.e. 7

[x x x la ni-ši]-⸢ia⸣-ṭa ma-ṣar-tú

r.e. 88

[x x x dan]-⸢na⸣-at

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P334689/.
